name: deeployable

scripts.setup: npm run setup -w api && npm run setup -w ui
scripts.build: npm run build -w api && npm run build -w ui
scripts.start: npm run start -w api & npm run start -w ui
scripts.dev: npm run dev -w api & npm run dev -w ui
